title: basananthe parvifolia
intro: Basananthe parvifolia, also known as the small-leaved basananthe or a variety of the genus Basananthe, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. Basananthe parvifolia has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fevers, as well as acting as an antidote for certain poisonous substances. Herbal preparations of Basananthe parvifolia typically involve the leaves and roots being dried and then used in tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
